result.name: Improved STL Validator ASCII/Binary
result.description: Validates ASCII or binary STL meshes for closure, non-manifold edges, degeneracy, orientation consistency, normals, area, and signed volume.

result.name: Improved STL Validator ASCII/Binary CLI
result.description: Validates a single ASCII or binary STL file from the command line and prints JSON suitability results.

result.stdout: {"all_ok": true, "results": {"binary_001.stl": {"ok": true, "result": {"valid": true, "issues": []}, "returncode": 0}, "binary_002.stl": {"ok": true, "result": {"valid": false, "issues": ["2 face normal(s) disagree with vertex winding"]}, "returncode": 0}, "binary_003.stl": {"ok": true, "result": {"valid": true, "issues": []}, "returncode": 0}, "binary_004.stl": {"ok": true, "result": {"valid": false, "issues": ["Mesh has 3 open edge(s)", "Signed volume is zero; mesh is not a proper closed solid"]}, "returncode": 0}, "binary_005.stl": {"ok": true, "result": {"valid": false, "issues": ["2 face normal(s) disagree with vertex winding"]}, "returncode": 0}, "binary_006.stl": {"ok": true, "result": {"valid": true, "issues": []}, "returncode": 0}, "binary_007.stl": {"ok": true, "result": {"valid": true, "issues": []}, "returncode": 0}, "binary_008.stl": {"ok": true, "result": {"valid": false, "issues": ["2 face normal(s) disagree with vertex winding"]}, "returncode": 0}, "binary_009.stl": {"ok": true, "result": {"valid": false, "issues": ["Mesh has 3 open edge(s)", "Signed volume is zero; mesh is not a proper closed solid"]}, "returncode": 0}, "binary_010.stl": {"ok": true, "result": {"valid": true, "issues": []}, "returncode": 0}}}

manifest.name: Validate STL CLI ASCII/Binary Single File
manifest.description: Validates a single STL file from the command line, correctly handling both ASCII and binary STL and printing JSON suitability results.
